title: Facade of San Giorgio Maggiore, Venice
tags: blue venice sky people italy cloud lighthouse white church sunshine skyline facade island george waiting italia catholic sitting shadows columns steps saints statues tourists christian monastery angels monks shade cupola dome venetian christianity piazza benedictine information venezia hospitality palladio sangiorgiomaggiore benedict palladian monasticism andreapalladio renassiance simeonesorella
description: This is where we stayed for our few days in Venice - not in the abbey church, but in the guestwing attached to it. You can just see that guestwing to the right of the photo. Benedictine hospitality can only be extolled at this particular monastery. The church and most of the monastic buildings were designed by Andrea Palladio and Simeone Sorella between 1565-97, though the monastery itself had been standing for a good six hundred years before that.

title: Gondolier, Venice (where else?)
tags: venice italy man male water muscles hat sunglasses reflections boat canal italian waiting italia pattern break moody embroidery handsome tshirt tourists pole business arrogant attitude crown ribbon parked job venezia gondolier venitian gilt swagger upholstery gondoler occupation boater moneymaker cigerette machio snear
description: According to a definition, "The gondola is propelled by a person (the gondolier) who stands facing the bow and rows with a forward stroke, followed by a compensating backward stroke." During my few days in Venice it seemed to me that the main occupation of the Gondolier was to preen, pose and display, with the occasional venture onto the waters to be admired by tourists at great financial cost to the said tourists.

title: Waiting for romance
tags: old venice italy geotagged for canal waiting empty romance oar romantic gondola gondoliers janusz leszczynski 004949 geo:lon=12337743 geo:lat=45437618
description: Actually never went on the ride , I like gondolas but don't like gondoliers … being by myself I just didn't see the point or maybe I'm just simply too cheep to spend 50 , 70 or 100 Euro on a ride to nowhere …. but it's an icon . Gondoliers and waiters in a fancy restaurant for me they are the same … try to ask them for directions without using there services …. yehhh sure Every time I don't know what to work on , I somehow run into the images from Venice and I still got few left. Maybe a bit about the technical part of the image : hand-held 3 image HDR but done at lower F-stop . After processing ( Photomatix and Photoshop ) just like all other HDRs I used Silver Efex B&W conversion on a separate layer with 40% opacity. Just if someone would be interested Please - View Large On Black See where this picture was taken, Venice [?] Norah Jones www.goear.com/listen/acdfbca/come-away-with-me-norah-jones
